notes: Pinned ratchet floors that must not regress. The contract_test_count metric is the static declaration count produced by scripts/audit.mjs::countTests (matches /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm across git-tracked tests/**/*.test.* files), not the vitest runtime total; the audit uses the static count so the ratchet is deterministic without shelling into vitest. Advancement is an explicit commit action; HEAD~1 moving-window comparison is insufficient (docs-only commits between regression and audit would hide the regression). Close gates depend on this file, not on HEAD~1 alone. See specs/plans/phase-1-close-revised.md §Slice 26b and ADR-0002 Addendum A. Initial floor 574 pinned post-Slice-26b (post-Codex-fold-in) HEAD static count. Slice 33 (P2.2): +26 (plugin-surface), 574 → 727. Slice 34 (P2.3): +13 (spine-coverage), 727 → 740. Slice 35 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #1 methodology upgrade): +39 (artifact-backing-path-integrity), 740 → 779. Slice 37 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #3 HIGH 2 widen event schema): +31 (slice-37-dispatch-transcript), 779 → 810. Slice 38 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #4 HIGH 1 dispatch wiring + ADR-0008): +18 (adapter-binding-coverage), 810 → 828. Slice 39 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #5 HIGH 4 artifact-path split): +2 (empty-allowlist + terminal-green guards), 828 → 830. Slice 40 (pre-P2.4 arc-close ceremony): +5 net (two-prong Check 26 tightening +6 / −3 superseded, +2 synthetic-shape tests per convergent MED 1 / LOW 2), 830 → 835. Slice 41 (ADR-0009 adapter invocation pattern + Check 28 `checkAdapterInvocationDiscipline` binding): +9 (adapter-invocation-discipline — 6 initial + 3 Codex fold-in), 835 → 844. Slice 42 (P2.4 real agent adapter — `src/runtime/adapters/agent.ts` + `src/runtime/adapters/dispatch-materializer.ts` + Check 29 `checkAdapterImportDiscipline` import-level scan per ADR-0009 §4 Slice 42 binding + Codex Slice 42 HIGH 1-5 + MED 1-4 + LOW 1-2 fold-ins): +41 total, 844 → 885. Slice 43a (P2.5 HIGH 5 retargeting — validateWorkflowKindPolicy helper extraction per plan §Slice 40 Retargeting note / §P2.5 Additional deliverable): +15 static declarations in tests/contracts/workflow-kind-policy.test.ts covering (a) checkWorkflowKindCanonicalPolicy audit-level helper (green/exempt/pass_through/red on explore + dogfood-run-0 + future-kind + missing phase + mode=strict + bad omits + non-object input + missing id); (b) validateWorkflowKindPolicy runtime-level wrapper (green on valid; ok:false with Zod issue summary on empty steps; ok:false when Zod catches safeParse violation; ok:true pass_through for unknown kinds; non-undefined reason string on malformed input); (c) single-source-of-truth assertions on WORKFLOW_KIND_CANONICAL_SETS + EXEMPT_WORKFLOW_IDS; (d) discriminated-union shape parity across audit-level result kinds. Shared JS canonical-set table now lives at scripts/policy/workflow-kind-policy.mjs; scripts/audit.mjs Check 24 and src/runtime/policy/workflow-kind-policy.ts both consume it, closing HIGH 5 drift surface identified by the pre-P2.4 arc-close composition review. Runtime fixture-load gate at src/cli/dogfood.ts:loadFixture now calls the helper post-Workflow.parse, rejecting policy-invalid fixtures with a clear error per plan §P2.5 acceptance. 885 → 900. Metadata fields (schema_version, last_advanced_at, last_advanced_in_slice) are audit-enforced via validatePinnedRatchetFloorData; floor zero or negative is rejected (Codex HIGH-2 fold-in). Future slices raise the floor only as an explicit ratchet-advance act.
